Description: Ensure useMemo/useEffect include all variables used inside.
Don't: Leave the array empty if using props.

Description: Components with 10+ props become hard to maintain.
Don't: Pass huge objects or 15+ individual props.

Description: Too many providers cause widespread re-renders.
Don't: Wrap the whole app in 20 context providers.

Description: Always use stable IDs for list keys.
Don't put things in state that can be calculated.
Don't: Sync two state variables with useEffect.
